PICKLERFRIGIL-TWIN_NEEDLE.title: Twin Needle
PICKLERFRIGIL-SNOW_CLOAK.title: Snow Cloak
PICKLERFRIGIL-SNOW_CLOAK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply {HypothermiaPower:diff()} [gold]Hypothermia[/gold] to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
PICKLERFRIGIL-CRYSTAL_NEEDLES.descriptio:
[gold]Icy[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {RepeatTotal:diff()} times. Number of attacks increases every time this card is drawn.
PICKLERFRIGIL-CRYSTAL_NEEDLES.title: Crystal Needles
PICKLERFRIGIL-ICICLE_KICK.title: Icicle Kick
PICKLERFRIGIL-BLIZZARD_KICK.title: Blizzard Kick
PICKLERFRIGIL-DEEP_CHILL.title: Deep Chill
PICKLERFRIGIL-FROST_BREATH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {HypothermiaPower:diff()} [gold]Hypothermia[/gold] to ALL enemies.
PICKLERFRIGIL-FROST_BREATH.title: Frost Breath
PICKLERFRIGIL-QUICK_SWIPE.title: Quick Swipe
PICKLERFRIGIL-FLIP_KICK.title: Flip Kick
PICKLERFRIGIL-HAILSTRIKE.description:
[gold]Unplayable[/gold]
[gold]Icy[/gold].
On Draw, deal {Damage:diff()} to a random enemy.
PICKLERFRIGIL-HAILSTRIKE.title: Hailstrike
PICKLERFRIGIL-CRYOSPEAR.title: Cryospear
PICKLERFRIGIL-CONJURE_SPEAR.title: Conjure Spear
PICKLERFRIGIL-STUMBLE.description:
Gain {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Lose ALL [gold]Flow[/gold].
Deal damage equal to [gold]Flow[/gold] lost times {Multiplier:diff()}.{InCombat:
(Deals {Damage:diff()} damage)|}
PICKLERFRIGIL-STUMBLE.title: Stumble
PICKLERFRIGIL-SLIDE_KICK.title: Slide Kick
PICKLERFRIGIL-POWDER_SNOW.title: Powder Snow
PICKLERFRIGIL-CASCADE.description:
[gold]Icy[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {Falloff:diff()} to all other enemies.
PICKLERFRIGIL-CASCADE.title: Ice Cascade
PICKLERFRIGIL-BITE.description: Exhaust a card in your hand.
PICKLERFRIGIL-BITE.title: Bite
PICKLERFRIGIL-PACK_ICE.description:
[gold]Icy[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your hand.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
PICKLERFRIGIL-PACK_ICE.title: Pack Ice
PICKLERFRIGIL-PIERCING_THRUST.descriptio:
[gold]Icy[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Accumulate[/gold] equal to damage dealt
PICKLERFRIGIL-PIERCING_THRUST.title: Piercing Thrust
PICKLERFRIGIL-DIVE_KICK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw cards equal to [gold]Flow.[/gold]
PICKLERFRIGIL-DIVE_KICK.title: Dive Kick
PICKLERFRIGIL-SLIP.title: Slip
PICKLERFRIGIL-GEODE_THROW.title: Geode Throw
PICKLERFRIGIL-SLIDE_THROUGH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {FlowPower:diff()} [gold]Flow[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
PICKLERFRIGIL-SLIDE_THROUGH.title: Slide Through
PICKLERFRIGIL-FLOURISH.title: Flourish
PICKLERFRIGIL-TRIPLE_AXEL.title: Triple Axel
PICKLERFRIGIL-SKATE.title: Skate
PICKLERFRIGIL-REPURPOSE.description: At the start of next turn, [gold]Accumulate[/gold] equal to remaining block.
PICKLERFRIGIL-REPURPOSE.title: Repurpose
PICKLERFRIGIL-COLD_FRONT.description: Apply {HypothermiaPower:diff()} [gold]Hypothermia[/gold] to ALL enemies X times.
PICKLERFRIGIL-COLD_FRONT.title: Cold Front
PICKLERFRIGIL-ACCELERATE.description:
On Draw, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Increase card draw and energy cost by 1.
PICKLERFRIGIL-ACCELERATE.title: Accelerate
PICKLERFRIGIL-GEMSENSE.title: Gemsense
PICKLERFRIGIL-SLEET_STORM.description: Apply {SleetStorm:diff()} [gold]Hypothermia[/gold] to ALL enemies each turn.
PICKLERFRIGIL-SLEET_STORM.title: Sleet Storm
PICKLERFRIGIL-SNOW_DANCER.title: Snow Dancer
PICKLERFRIGIL-SNOW_SPIRAL.description:
[gold]Icy[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Next turn, create {IfUpgraded:show:a [gold]Rising Spiral[/gold]|an [gold]Inverse Spiral[/gold]} in hand.
PICKLERFRIGIL-SNOW_SPIRAL.title: Snow Spiral
PICKLERFRIGIL-REVERSE_SPIRAL.title: Inverse Spiral
PICKLERFRIGIL-RISING_SPIRAL.description:
[gold]Icy[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Next turn, create an [gold]Descending Spiral[/gold] in hand.
PICKLERFRIGIL-RISING_SPIRAL.title: Rising Spiral
PICKLERFRIGIL-DESCENDING_SPIRAL.title: Descending Spiral
PICKLERFRIGIL-GLACIATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] twice.
This amount increases by 1 for every [gold]Icy[/gold] card played while in hand.
PICKLERFRIGIL-GLACIATE.title: Glaciate
PICKLERFRIGIL-HOARDING_INSTINCTS.descrip: At the end of combat, gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
PICKLERFRIGIL-HOARDING_INSTINCTS.title: Hoarding Instincts
PICKLERFRIGIL-CHECK_POCKETS.description: When an enemy is defeated, create {Gems:diff()} [gold]{Gems:plural:Gemstone|Gemstones}[/gold] in hand.
PICKLERFRIGIL-CHECK_POCKETS.title: Check Pockets
PICKLERFRIGIL-ICEBREAKER.title: Icebreaker
PICKLERFRIGIL-ANKLE_CHOMP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy gains [blue]67%[/blue] fewer [gold]Block[/gold] this turn.
PICKLERFRIGIL-ANKLE_CHOMP.title: Ankle Chomp
PICKLERFRIGIL-DIAMOND_DUST.description:
[gold]Icy[/gold].
Remove ALL [gold]Flow[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for every [gold]Flow[/gold] lost this way.
PICKLERFRIGIL-DIAMOND_DUST.title: Diamond Dust
PICKLERFRIGIL-FREE_SKATE.description:
ALL cards have their cost reduced by 1 this turn.
Playing a card increases its cost by 1 this turn.
PICKLERFRIGIL-FREE_SKATE.title: Free Skate
PICKLERFRIGIL-TOPAZ.description: If Exhausted, at the end of combat, gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
PICKLERFRIGIL-TOPAZ.title: Topaz
PICKLERFRIGIL-AMETHYST.title: Amethyst
PICKLERFRIGIL-DIAMOND.title: Diamond
PICKLERFRIGIL-OPAL.description: If Exhausted, apply {HypothermiaPower:diff()} [gold]Hypothermia[/gold] to ALL enemies.
PICKLERFRIGIL-OPAL.title: Opal
PICKLERFRIGIL-EMERALD.title: Emerald
